div.head: The Minister in Poland (Gibson) to the Secretary of State
div.p: 199. Department’s instructions 1116, August 6th. See my despatch number 892, August 8th.Not printed. Inasmuch as Minister of Finance apparently anxious to wreck Guaranty contract request authorization to change representations outlined in the last paragraph in such a way as to eliminate all reference to Guaranty contract and intimate that Department might be obliged to reconsider its entire attitude towards the question of remittances to Poland. I believe this would obviate all undesirable encouragement to Minister of Finance.
